note: Rows cover +/-1 s around the fastest sample in the selected flights.

name: method
value: RATM 500Hz CSVs are trajectory/control/voltage flight logs. Use them to constrain speed envelope, control commands, voltage sag shape, and feasibility of drag/thrust models. Do not treat peak-speed comparisons as isolated drag coefficients without wind, attitude, and thrust reconstruction.
